# Checklists

Checklists prevent mistakes and ensure nothing is forgotten. Use these before competitions, before meetings, and before any important activity.

---

# Section 7: Checklists {.unnumbered}

## 7.1 Pre-Match Checklist

Complete this checklist **before every match**, including practice matches.

### Robot Inspection

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ PRE-MATCH ROBOT CHECKLIST                                          │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  STRUCTURAL                                                        │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ All screws tightened and secured                               │
│  □ No loose beams or connections                                   │
│  □ Wheel/tread tension correct                                     │
│  □ Cable management secure (no hanging wires)                     │
│  □ No sharp edges that could catch                                 │
│                                                                    │
│  MOTORS & MECHANISMS                                              │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ All motors mounted securely                                     │
│  □ Gears properly meshed (no grinding)                             │
│  □ Intake/mechanism moves freely                                   │
│  □ Rubber bands intact and properly tensioned                      │
│  □ Endgame mechanism locked/securured                              │
│                                                                    │
│  ELECTRONICS                                                       │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Brain powered on and functional                                 │
│  □ All smart cables fully inserted                                 │
│  □ Sensors connected and responding                                │
│  □ Controller linked to brain                                      │
│  □ Battery level > 80% (check Brain display)                      │
│                                                                    │
│  AUTONOMOUS                                                        │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Correct program selected                                        │
│  □ Gyro/ inertial sensor calibrated (if used)                      │
│  □ Autonomous starts correctly on signal                          │
│  □ All autonomous routines tested this session                    │
│                                                                    │
│  SPARE PARTS (if available)                                        │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Spare batteries                                                 │
│  □ Spare cortex cables                                             │
│  □ Basic tool kit                                                  │
│  □ Zip ties and hardware                                           │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Driver Station Checklist

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ DRIVER STATION CHECKLIST                                          │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  CONTROLLER SETUP                                                  │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Controller battery level adequate                                │
│  □ Controller configured to team number                            │
│  □ All buttons tested and responsive                               │
│  □ All sticks range tested (full 0-100)                          │
│  □ Deadband settings verified                                      │
│                                                                    │
│  COMMUNICATION                                                     │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Radio link connected (LED indicators)                          │
│  □ Backup communication signals established                        │
│  □ Timekeeper knows role                                           │
│  □ Driver A and B positions confirmed                              │
│                                                                    │
│  MATCH PLAN                                                        │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Autonomous routine confirmed                                    │
│  □ Driver handoff plan understood                                  │
│  □ Endgame timing reviewed                                         │
│  □ Backup plans discussed                                          │
│  □ Strategy card accessible                                        │
│                                                                    │
│  MENTAL PREPARATION                                                │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Both drivers focused                                            │
│  □ Confidence level adequate                                       │
│  □ Any last-minute concerns addressed                              │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 7.2 Post-Match Checklist

Complete after every match to prepare for the next one.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ POST-MATCH CHECKLIST                                               │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  IMMEDIATE (within 5 minutes)                                     │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Retrieve robot from field                                       │
│  □ Quick visual inspection for damage                              │
│  □ Battery swap if below 70%                                       │
│  □ Report any issues to Pit Manager                                │
│                                                                    │
│  AT PIT STATION                                                    │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Full damage inspection                                           │
│  □ Re-tighten any loose connections                                │
│  □ Test all mechanisms                                             │
│  □ Verify autonomous still works                                   │
│  □ Document any issues in notebook                                 │
│                                                                    │
│  MATCH ANALYSIS                                                    │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Score recorded                                                   │
│  □ What went well?                                                 │
│  □ What went wrong?                                                │
│  □ What needs to change?                                           │
│  □ Opponent information noted?                                     │
│                                                                    │
│  NEXT MATCH PREP                                                   │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Robot in queue area                                             │
│  □ Fresh battery if needed                                         │
│  □ Changes implemented (if any)                                    │
│  □ Updated strategy (if needed)                                    │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 7.3 Robot Maintenance Checklist

Weekly maintenance keeps your robot reliable.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ WEEKLY ROBOT MAINTENANCE                                           │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  BEFORE EVERY SESSION                                              │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Visual inspection of all connections                            │
│  □ Check wheel/tread wear                                          │
│  □ Verify battery condition                                         │
│  □ Test all motors individually                                     │
│  □ Check sensor response                                            │
│                                                                    │
│  END OF EVERY SESSION                                              │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Clean debris from mechanisms                                    │
│  □ Remove any tangled rubber bands                                 │
│  □ Check for worn parts                                            │
│  □ Secure any loose hardware                                       │
│                                                                    │
│  EVERY 2 WEEKS                                                     │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Deep clean all mechanisms                                       │
│  □ Lubricate shafts (dry lubricant only)                          │
│  □ Check gear wear                                                 │
│  □ Test battery capacity                                            │
│  □ Replace worn rubber bands                                       │
│  □ Inspect and replace worn cables                                 │
│                                                                    │
│  BEFORE TOURNAMENT                                                 │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Complete 2-week checklist                                       │
│  □ Build spare parts kit                                           │
│  □ Pack tool kit                                                   │
│  □ Pack backup batteries                                           │
│  □ Full functionality test                                         │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 7.4 Pit Setup Checklist

Use when setting up your pit area at tournaments.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ PIT SETUP CHECKLIST                                                │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  WORKSPACE                                                         │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Table covered (cloth or mat)                                    │
│  □ Adequate lighting                                               │
│  □ Power strip accessible (if available)                           │
│  □ Space for robot, tools, and laptop                              │
│                                                                    │
│  ROBOT STATION                                                     │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Robot case or storage area                                      │
│  □ Charging station set up                                         │
│  □ Spare parts organized                                           │
│  □ Tool kit accessible                                             │
│                                                                    │
│  DISPLAY MATERIALS                                                 │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Team banner/flag                                                │
│  □ Pit display (team info, robot info)                            │
│  □ Engineering notebook (on display)                               │
│  □ Team resume printed                                              │
│  □ Business cards (if applicable)                                  │
│                                                                    │
│  ELECTRONICS                                                       │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Battery charger                                                 │
│  □ Spare batteries (minimum 4)                                     │
│  □ Programming cable                                               │
│  □ Laptop with software                                             │
│  □ Extension cord                                                  │
│                                                                    │
│  TOOLS                                                             │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Hex keys (all sizes)                                            │
│  □ Screwdrivers (Phillips and flathead)                            │
│  □ Pliers                                                          │
│  □ Wire cutters                                                    │
│  □ Zip ties (various sizes)                                        │
│  □ Electrical tape                                                 │
│  □ Multi-meter (for advanced teams)                                │
│  □ VEX motor controller (if available)                             │
│                                                                    │
│  SAFETY                                                            │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Safety glasses available for team                               │
│  □ First aid kit accessible                                        │
│  □ Fire extinguisher location known                                │
│  □ Emergency exits identified                                       │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 7.5 Emergency Procedures

### Robot Won't Respond

```
EMERGENCY: Robot Not Responding
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

STEP 1: Check Connections
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Are all smart cables fully inserted?
□ Are there any visible cable damage?
□ Try reconnecting the cable

STEP 2: Power Cycle
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Turn off the Brain
□ Wait 10 seconds
□ Turn on the Brain
□ Wait for startup complete

STEP 3: Check Controller
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Is controller linked? (look for indicator on Brain)
□ Try re-pairing controller
□ Try different controller (if available)

STEP 4: Last Resort
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Download current program again
□ If issue persists, robot may need pit crew inspection

TIME ESTIMATE: 2-5 minutes

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

### Autonomous Failure During Match

```
EMERGENCY: Autonomous Not Working
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

IMMEDIATE (during autonomous period):
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ DO NOT touch controller during autonomous
□ If autonomous fails, let it fail
□ Driver control starts automatically at the end of autonomous

AFTER THE MATCH:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Diagnose what went wrong
□ Check sensor readings
□ Test autonomous code with sensors
□ Look for environmental factors (lighting, field differences)

PREVENTIVE FOR NEXT MATCH:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Have a backup simple autonomous ready
□ Verify all sensors before match
□ Document any environmental concerns

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

### Motor or Mechanism Failure

```
EMERGENCY: Motor/ Mechanism Failure
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

IMMEDIATE (during match):
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Assess if robot can still compete
□ Modify driver strategy if possible
□ Complete remaining possible actions

AT PIT (between matches):
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Identify which motor/mechanism failed
□ Check for debris causing jam
□ Inspect for broken parts
□ If motor: test motor directly
□ If structure: assess repair time

REPAIR DECISION:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Can repair in < 5 minutes? → Repair now
□ Can robot still compete? → Compete with limitation
□ Major repair needed? → Prioritize during lunch break

TOOLS NEEDED:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□ Screwdriver
□ Replacement parts (if available)
□ Rubber bands
□ Backup motor (if available)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

## 7.6 Pre-Tournament Final Checklist

Complete this the night before or morning of the tournament.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ PRE-TOURNAMENT FINAL CHECKLIST                                      │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                    │
│  NIGHT BEFORE                                                      │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ All batteries charged                                            │
│  □ Robot packed and ready                                          │
│  □ Tool kit packed                                                 │
│  □ Spare parts sorted                                              │
│  □ Team shirts/uniforms ready                                      │
│  □ Notebook updated                                                │
│  □ Schedule reviewed                                                │
│                                                                    │
│  MORNING OF TOURNAMENT                                             │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Robot secured in case                                           │
│  □ Batteries in bag                                                │
│  □ Chargers in bag                                                  │
│  □ Tools in bag                                                     │
│  □ Laptop charged                                                   │
│  □ Notebook in bag                                                  │
│  □ Team materials (poster, resume) in bag                         │
│  □ Personal items (water, snacks)                                   │
│  □ Competition consent/registration forms                          │
│                                                                    │
│  AT VENUE - UNLOADING                                              │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Move equipment to pit area                                     │
│  □ Set up pit station                                              │
│  □ Plug in charger, start battery charging                        │
│  □ Place pit display materials                                     │
│  □ Put robot on pit table                                           │
│                                                                    │
│  AT VENUE - FIRST HOUR                                             │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ Complete pit setup checklist                                    │
│  □ Run robot inspection checklist                                  │
│  □ Get in inspection queue early                                   │
│  □ Test practice field (if available)                              │
│  □ Verify autonomous works on official field                       │
│  □ Meet with drivers for final strategy                            │
│                                                                    │
│  CRITICAL REMINDERS                                                │
│  □────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  □ DO NOT leave batteries discharging overnight                     │
│  □ DO keep robot secured when not in use                          │
│  □ DO have backup plans for common failures                        │
│  □ DO stay hydrated and fed                                       │
│  □ DO communicate with your team throughout the day               │
│                                                                    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
